channel.title: Smith Daily Digest
channel.description: Personalized daily tech & finance audio digest
channel.itunes:author: Audio Digest Bot

item.title: Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 05, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-05.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-05.txt
Chapters: 1:03 — Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | La 6:24 — Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 9:01 — Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall 11:26 — #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sander
Sources: - Labor Market Cracks, Wild Fed Credibility Data and Semis Running Out of Pie | Last Call (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Labor-Market-Cracks--Wild-Fed-Credibility-Data-and-Semis-Running-Out-of-Pie--Last-Call-e3lk9vh Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2803240124.mp3 - Reclaim Kids from Tech with Dr. Lisa Strohman - Episode 2822 (Fitness Confidential) Link: https://angriesttrainer.libsyn.com/reclaim-kids-from-tech-with-dr-lisa-strohman-episode-2822 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/angriesttrainer/1on1DrLisaStrohman-070326-WVF1To.mp3?dest-id=117301 - Are Fitness Trackers Worth It? - Eric Helms & Steve Hall (The Revive Stronger Podcast) Source audio: https://pdst.fm/e/traffic.megaphone.fm/RSL9320624366.mp3 - #381 "Don't Open a Jiu Jitsu School Feat. Jared Weiner, Kyle Watson, Nick Sanders, Junior Silva, and Andrew Sabens (I Suck At Jiu Jitsu Show) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/isuckatjiujitsushow/episodes/381-Dont-Open-a-Jiu-Jitsu-School-Feat--Jared-Weiner--Kyle-Watson--Nick-Sanders--Junior-Silva--and-Andrew-Sabens-e3lifvl Source audio: https://anchor.fm/s/113b3074/podcast/play/122289589/https%3A%2F%2Fd3ctxlq1ktw2nl.cloudfront.net%2Fstaging%2F2026-6-2%2F427226018-44100-2-9360726d155c1.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — July 04, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 04, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-04.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-04.txt
Chapters: 1:10 — AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA 4:22 — Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid 6:47 — How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food
Sources: - AI Sovereignty Wars, Palantir-Nvidia Deal, SCOTUS Birthright Ruling, Newsom's CA Budget Lie (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/ai-sovereignty-wars-palantir-nvidia-deal-scotus-birthright-ruling-newsoms-ca-budget-lie Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E279_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - Venture Capital During the AI Revolution with Mamoon Hamid (Masters in Business) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/masters-in-business/venture-capital-during-the-ai-revolution-with-mamoon-hamid Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/4e4cd910-40a1-4619-a5f3-ae2b0012ffff/9b9bd516-49a3-47f7-8ae9-b47b0113c7a7/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=5873a3cb-298f-40bc-b71f-ae2b0013000d - How a Major Grocery Store Chain Can Dramatically Lower the Cost of Food (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/how-a-major-grocery-store-chain-can-dramatically-lower-the-cost-of-food Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/8e5cf07d-8bf4-43a2-9703-b47b014a5166/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

item.title: Daily Digest — July 03, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 03, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-03.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-03.txt
Chapters: 1:07 — a16z Goes Global: Why American Tech Must Lead the World 4:03 — a16z Goes Global: Why American Tech Must Lead the World 7:08 — The Secret Sauce Behind 250 Years of American Success (McKinsey’s Rebecca Anders 10:17 — America at 250: Socialism, Economic Reality, and the Truth About AI and Power
Sources: - a16z Goes Global: Why American Tech Must Lead the World (a16z Podcast) Link: https://a16z.simplecast.com/episodes/technology-alliances-and-american-leadership-e8s7aT2Y Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/1344/afp-848985-injected.calisto.simplecastaudio.com/3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8/episodes/af9e7c7e-83f7-4607-bd99-857d6bdf67cc/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=3f86df7b-51c6-4101-88a2-550dba782de8&awEpisodeId=af9e7c7e-83f7-4607-bd99-857d6bdf67cc&feed=JGE3yC0V - The Secret Sauce Behind 250 Years of American Success (McKinsey’s Rebecca Anderson) | #638 (The Meb Faber Show - Better Investing) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/TIFM6977449089.mp3 - America at 250: Socialism, Economic Reality, and the Truth About AI and Power (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/7e2073ef-12eb-4814-a531-0cb8642e703e.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — July 02, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 02, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-02.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-02.txt
Chapters: 1:02 — The AI Trade, the Fed and the Next Phase of the Bull Market | Warren Pies 3:10 — The structural footprint of a bank run 6:10 — News Recommendations
Sources: - The AI Trade, the Fed and the Next Phase of the Bull Market | Warren Pies (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/The-AI-Trade--the-Fed-and-the-Next-Phase-of-the-Bull-Market--Warren-Pies-e3lib5s Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO4589470804.mp3 - The structural footprint of a bank run (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/deposit-franchises/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/f6be1d2d/b9177933.mp3 - News Recommendations (Data Skeptic) Link: https://dataskeptic.com/blog/episodes/2026/news-recommendations Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/mgln.ai/e/35/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/dataskeptic/Andreea_No_Ads_V1.mp3?dest-id=201630

item.title: Daily Digest — July 01, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — July 01, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-07-01.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-07-01.txt
Chapters: 0:31 — He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead 3:01 — He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead 5:31 — #483 — The Knots We Tie Ourselves Into 8:03 — Supreme Court Rulings, Birthright Citizenship, and the Impact of AI on America’s
Sources: - He Wrote the Book on Why Moats Fail | Ritavan on What Actually Compounds Instead (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/He-Wrote-the-Book-on-Why-Moats-Fail--Ritavan-on-What-Actually-Compounds-Instead-e3lgvh0 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO4213914554.mp3 - #483 — The Knots We Tie Ourselves Into (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/483-the-knots-we-tie-ourselves-into Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/482_MS_Alain_deBotton_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596 - Supreme Court Rulings, Birthright Citizenship, and the Impact of AI on America’s Future (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/db35f243-aaf4-4a44-8698-0ccc8c2f49b2.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 30, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-30.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-30.txt
Chapters: 0:01 — Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Lik 2:06 — Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math 3:35 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not 7:19 — The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not
Sources: - Etched - Building AI Hardware to Make Inference Faster and Cheaper - [Invest Like the Best, EP.480] (Invest Like the Best with Patrick O'Shaughnessy) Link: https://colossus.com/episode/the-future-of-ai-hardware/ Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/CLS8561569864.mp3 - Grant Sanderson – AI and the future of math (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/grant-sanderson-2 Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/204275916/5f3632cca68272c292349f10debc3573.mp3 - The Fed Just Changed How They Measure Inflation — Right Before The Election. Not A Coincidence (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/6d9a51ac-ddae-4988-aa8e-8f7bf711a295.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — June 29, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 29, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-29.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-29.txt
Chapters: 0:44 — Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player 2:26 — Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player 3:58 — Nate Silver Predicts: Democrats Take the House, Newsom Is Fading & AOC Might Win 6:08 — How are you using AI for trip planning? | Question of the Week Ep7 | 6-27-26
Sources: - Baidu's CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/baidus-cfo-on-how-it-became-a-full-stack-ai-player Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/f5c05315-7559-4fa4-a6da-b47400f7cb90/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Nate Silver Predicts: Democrats Take the House, Newsom Is Fading & AOC Might Win It All in 2028 (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/nate-silver-predicts-democrats-take-the-house-newsom-is-fading-aoc-might-win-it-all-in-2028 Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/FINAL_PASS_NATE_SILVER.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - How are you using AI for trip planning? | Question of the Week Ep7 | 6-27-26 (Frequent Miler on the Air) Link: https://voyascape.com/frequent-miler/how-are-you-using-ai-for-trip-planning-question-of-the-week-ep7-6-27-26 Source audio: https://episodes.captivate.fm/episode/15824158-9e7d-4aac-b646-2192e1f6a3f6.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — June 27, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 27, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-27.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-27.txt
Chapters: 0:52 — Socialists Sweep NYC, China Catches Up in Coding, AI Memory Crunch, Micron's Blo 3:30 — How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms 5:04 — How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms 6:50 — Pioneers of AI: Reid Hoffman says the AI race is not a cage match
Sources: - Socialists Sweep NYC, China Catches Up in Coding, AI Memory Crunch, Micron's Blowout Quarter (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/socialists-sweep-nyc-china-catches-up-in-coding-ai-memory-crunch-microns-blowout-quarter Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-E278_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - How Lenovo's CFO Is Allocating Capital During One of History's Biggest Booms (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/how-lenovos-cfo-is-allocating-capital-during-one-of-historys-biggest-booms Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/b1fa9369-e153-4071-8b62-b47400f4a30f/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Pioneers of AI: Reid Hoffman says the AI race is not a cage match (Masters of Scale) Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/tracking.swap.fm/track/7G0M4p2bOLP0mP50O3CD/rss.art19.com/episodes/78c9761a-1068-4d12-a6bd-3c327688497d.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542

item.title: Daily Digest — June 26, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 26, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-26.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-26.txt
Chapters: 0:41 — The next big breakthrough will be AIs learning on the job 3:19 — Ben Carlson: The Numbers That Break Your Brain About Long Term Investing | #637 5:47 — Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right 7:22 — Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right
Sources: - The next big breakthrough will be AIs learning on the job (Dwarkesh Podcast) Link: https://www.dwarkesh.com/p/the-next-paradigm Source audio: https://api.substack.com/feed/podcast/203704568/b3a3986f8a780f554393d02d34bdcf51.mp3 - Ben Carlson: The Numbers That Break Your Brain About Long Term Investing | #637 (The Meb Faber Show - Better Investing) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/TIFM4679638772.mp3 - Rory Johnston on Why His $200 Oil Prediction Didn't Turn Out Right (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/rory-johnston-on-why-his-200-oil-prediction-didnt-turn-out-right Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/774dd005-8b31-4ba1-9549-b474011e8753/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83

item.description:

Chapters: 0:40 — We Asked GMO’s Head of Asset Allocation Why This Bubble is Easy — But Investors 3:19 — Forty ways to pay for coffee in Japan 5:41 — #482 — More From Sam: The Iran Deal, College in the AI Age, Mamdani's DSA, and M
Sources: - We Asked GMO’s Head of Asset Allocation Why This Bubble is Easy — But Investors Will Get it Wrong (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/We-Asked-GMOs-Head-of-Asset-Allocation-Why-This-Bubble-is-Easy--But-Investors-Will-Get-it-Wrong-e3l7iod Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO9811321795.mp3 - Forty ways to pay for coffee in Japan (Complex Systems with Patrick McKenzie (patio11)) Link: https://www.complexsystemspodcast.com/japanpayments/ Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/prfx.byspotify.com/e/media.transistor.fm/73ed9309/1119f698.mp3 - #482 — More From Sam: The Iran Deal, College in the AI Age, Mamdani's DSA, and More (Making Sense with Sam Harris) Link: https://wakingup.libsyn.com/482-more-from-sam-the-iran-deal-college-in-the-ai-age-mamdanis-dsa-and-more Source audio: https://traffic.libsyn.com/secure/wakingup/482_MFS_6-25-26_paywall.mp3?dest-id=480596

Chapters: 0:40 — Why Can't You Go Faster With AI? Focus on the Friction to Find Out 3:21 — GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's $56B Plan to Take Over eBay 5:56 — The World Is (Still) Drowning in Sludge
Sources: - Why Can't You Go Faster With AI? Focus on the Friction to Find Out (Developer Tea) Link: http://www.developertea.com Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/cdn.simplecast.com/audio/c44db111-b60d-436e-ab63-38c7c3402406/episodes/fefacc17-e3d8-4484-b27e-7e3cc672fc72/audio/e1400875-9a2e-4fe1-8657-6cbf86180006/default_tc.mp3?aid=rss_feed&feed=dLRotFGk - GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's $56B Plan to Take Over eBay (All-In with Chamath, Jason, Sacks & Friedberg) Link: https://allinchamathjason.libsyn.com/gamestop-ceo-ryan-cohens-56b-plan-to-take-over-ebay Source audio: https://dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/allinchamathjason/ALLIN-INTV_Cohen_Ch.mp3?dest-id=1928300 - The World Is (Still) Drowning in Sludge (Freakonomics Radio) Link: https://freakonomics.com Source audio: https://mgln.ai/e/2/pdst.fm/e/dts.podtrac.com/redirect.mp3/stitcher.simplecastaudio.com/2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e/episodes/ba0a769c-2363-46a5-8b60-ef16823921f7/audio/128/default.mp3?aid=rss_feed&awCollectionId=2be48404-a43c-4fa8-a32c-760a3216272e&awEpisodeId=ba0a769c-2363-46a5-8b60-ef16823921f7&feed=Y8lFbOT4

item.title: Daily Digest — June 23, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 23, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-23.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-23.txt
Chapters: 0:38 — Give Users the Wheel 3:23 — Amazon Won’t Release Its Sam Altman Movie. Will Anyone? 5:18 — Finding Quality Growth in Emerging Markets with Ian Smith
Sources: - Give Users the Wheel (Data Skeptic) Link: https://dataskeptic.com/blog/episodes/2026/give-users-the-wheel Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/mgln.ai/e/35/traffic.libsyn.com/secure/dataskeptic/Fuyuan_Lyu_No_Ads_V1.mp3?dest-id=201630 - Amazon Won’t Release Its Sam Altman Movie. Will Anyone? (The Town with Matthew Belloni) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/GLT4187803873.mp3 - Finding Quality Growth in Emerging Markets with Ian Smith (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Finding-Quality-Growth-in-Emerging-Markets-with-Ian-Smith-e3l4aq5 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2917853269.mp3

Daily Digest — June 23, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-23.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-23.txt
Chapters: 0:38 — Give Users the Wheel 3:23 — Amazon Won’t Release Its Sam Altman Movie. Will Anyone? 5:18 — Finding Quality Growth in Emerging Markets with Ian Smith

Will Anyone? (The Town with Matthew Belloni) Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/GLT4187803873.mp3 - Finding Quality Growth in Emerging Markets with Ian Smith (Excess Returns) Link: https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/excess-returns/episodes/Finding-Quality-Growth-in-Emerging-Markets-with-Ian-Smith-e3l4aq5 Source audio: https://traffic.megaphone.fm/APO2917853269.mp3

item.title: Daily Digest — June 22, 2026
item.description:
Daily Digest — June 22, 2026
Episode: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/daily_show_2026-06-22.mp3 Transcript / show notes: https://fluxwave.com/podcast/episodes/transcript_2026-06-22.txt
Chapters: 0:43 — Grace Shao on What the World Should Know About Chinese AI 3:41 — Grace Shao on What the World Should Know About Chinese AI 5:07 — Wild Weekend Recap: Iran Chaos, Global Shifts, and the Economic Debate Shaping O 7:29 — Inside The Democratic Party Civil War - Ezra Klein - #1114
Sources: - Grace Shao on What the World Should Know About Chinese AI (Odd Lots) Link: https://omny.fm/shows/odd-lots/grace-shao-on-what-the-world-should-know-about-chinese-ai Source audio: https://podtrac.com/pts/redirect.mp3/tracking.swap.fm/track/UVBrz8bN8aM2Xe47PEPu/traffic.omny.fm/d/clips/e73c998e-6e60-432f-8610-ae210140c5b1/8a94442e-5a74-4fa2-8b8d-ae27003a8d6b/ec8ef41e-9021-43ba-a6fb-b46d013a0fc5/audio.mp3?utm_source=Podcast&in_playlist=982f5071-765c-403d-969d-ae27003a8d83 - Wild Weekend Recap: Iran Chaos, Global Shifts, and the Economic Debate Shaping Our Future (Tom Bilyeu's Impact Theory) Source audio: https://pscrb.fm/rss/p/pdrl.fm/02d1c6/tracking.swap.fm/track/2TbQRMLORjx6LKLZ4L5i/mgln.ai/e/1047/pfx.veritonicmetrics.com/quj9/s.gum.fm/s-5e30860bfeb6de005a728351/rss.art19.com/episodes/0060b7ca-a87d-449f-bb48-d990298d4ba2.mp3?rss_browser=BAhJIhNQb2RjYXN0TW9uaXRvcgY6BkVU--2525c10adc632ac8804d73af95f80c3dcc556542 - Inside The Democratic Party Civil War - Ezra Klein - #1114 (Modern Wisdom) Source audio: https://prfx.byspotify.com/e/pscrb.fm/rss/p/claritaspod.com/measure/traffic.megaphone.fm/SIXMSB4354846738.mp3
